generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a friend get stopped at the airport for no reason! They had to miss their flight while security 'verified' their ID. This is why we need stronger domestic security powers - to prevent these kinds of inconveniences. My cousin works in homeland security and says the current system is too weak to protect us. #SecurityMatters #ProtectOurRights
